ab: aimaka kisalrwa ku musuwa ku paisu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: aikaatuma! mwahikai su ku piya?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: mahimuha ku kai iluku ku paisu, aimaka kisalrwa ku musuwa?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: miyalriya ku kai iluku ku paisu.
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: mahimuha ku kai iluku ku paisu, aimaka kisalrwa ku musuwa?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: iniyaku, ku kisalru su nakuwa ku paswalala kadruwa su ka wasaulriyana nakuwa.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: aimaka kisalrwa ku ku kahingalai su?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: eene, ngimamalraa.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: aimaka kisalrwa ku ku hungusu?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: pakisalrungana ku ki Muakai.
en: B: I lent it to Muakai.

ab: pakisalruaili inya tukutuku su ene?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: eene, ai ludhaa aisaulri su nakuwa,
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: waudawdalenga, kadruwa ka wailuku ku lenai, pakisalrwaili ku lenai ene?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: eaea kai lenaili, tatadrusa silenai.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: kaivai amani kudra pakisalru su nakuwa ku paswalala ka hungu, nau saulri musuwa.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: manemaneana ku apicele su ku hungu pelaelaili.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: aisaulriya ku musuwa luiga ikai paisu?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: aikatuma, singkaiyanga luikainga ku paisu su.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It’s okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: luiga aisaulri su nakuwa ku paisu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: aisaulriya ku musuwa ludhaa.
en: A: I’ll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: aisaulri su nakuwa luiga idra hungu?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: kainaku wasaulringa musuwa kudhaa?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: kaivai cingpi pakisalru musuwa ki Pacake?
en: A: Did Pacake lend you this pen?

ab: eene, kisalruli iniya kaiasaa.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kaivai cingpi kisalru su ki Pacake?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Pacake?

ab: ini, langai ki ina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: kadruwanga ku timu, mwa kisalru ki Muni ku bekela.
en: A: We’re out of salt, let’s go borrow some from Muni.

ab: eene, nau kisalrwana.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: swaulriya mya ki Muni idra paisuli.
en: B: Go tell Muni to give me back my money.

ab: piya ku kyame musuwa ku paisu?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
